name: Understand-Anything
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        Lum1104 /

      Understand-Anything  

    
      Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.
summary: 该项目能将任意代码转化为可交互的知识图谱，支持探索、搜索和提问，兼容多种主流AI编程工具，通过可视化图谱帮助开发者更直观地理解代码逻辑。

name: rohitg00
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        rohitg00 /

      ai-engineering-from-scratch  

    
      Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.
summary: 该项目是一个关于AI工程实践的教程库，旨在帮助开发者从零开始学习、构建并部署AI项目。

name: mukul975
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        mukul975 /

      Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills  

    
      754 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 5 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND & NIST AI RMF · agentskills.io standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · 26 security domains · Apache 2.0
summary: 该项目整理了754个结构化的网络安全技能，适用于AI代理，并映射到5个主要框架，支持多种AI平台和工具，涵盖26个安全领域。值得关注是因为它为AI在网络安全领域的应用提供了标准化技能集，兼容主流框架和平台。

name: twenty
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        twentyhq /

      twenty  

    
      The open alternative to Salesforce, designed for AI.
summary: Twenty 是一个开源的 Salesforce 替代方案，专为 AI 设计，值得关注因为它提供了更开放的客户关系管理解决方案。

name: affaan-m
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        affaan-m /

      ECC  

    
      The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
summary: 该项目是一个针对AI代码助手（如Claude Code、Codex等）的性能优化系统，专注于提升技能、记忆、安全性和研发效率，值得关注因其前沿的AI开发优化技术。

name: knowledge-work-plugins
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        anthropics /

      knowledge-work-plugins  

    
      Open source repository of plugins primarily intended for knowledge workers to use in Claude Cowork
summary: 该项目是专为知识工作者设计的开源插件集合，主要用于增强Claude Cowork的功能，值得关注因其能显著提升工作效率和协作体验。

name: stop-slop
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        hardikpandya /

      stop-slop  

    
      A skill file for removing AI tells from prose
summary: 该项目是一个用于消除AI生成文本特征的技能文件，值得关注因为它能帮助提升文本的自然度和隐蔽性。

name: jellyfin
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        jellyfin /

      jellyfin  

    
      The Free Software Media System - Server Backend & API
summary: Jellyfin 是一个开源的媒体系统，提供服务器后端和 API，用于管理和流式传输个人媒体库，值得关注因为它完全免费且无广告，支持多平台使用。
